content.speakerText: Hey, I just got a new haircut—what do you think?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我刚剪了新发型，你觉得怎么样？
expectedAnswers: It's fantastic! The layers really highlight your face shape.
Wow, you look amazing! This style is so you.
Nice cut! It gives you a much more confident vibe.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达赞美，而非模糊回应
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无中式英语
表达自然度：是否使用地道口语表达，如 'so you', 'vibe', 'highlight'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'style', 'look', 'suit' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks! I was kinda nervous about it.
expectedAnswers: No way! You totally rocked it—I wish I had the courage to try that.
Seriously, you're overthinking it. It looks professional and fresh.
Don't even apologize—it's one of your best looks yet!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否有效缓解对方焦虑并给予肯定
语言准确性：语法正确，语气自然，避免生硬纠正
表达自然度：是否使用口语化表达如 'rocked it', 'overthinking', 'no way'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'nervous', 'rock', 'look', 'professional' 等相关词

content.speakerText: I changed my hairstyle—what do you think?
content.speakerTextCn: 我换了新发型，你觉得怎么样？
expectedAnswers: I love it! It gives you such a modern, edgy look.
You look totally refreshed—this style suits you better than your old one.
Wow, that’s a bold change! But it works so well on you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚赞美并指出具体优点
语言准确性：使用恰当形容词和结构，如 'edgy look', 'suits better'
表达自然度：是否使用真实语境中的口语节奏和语气词（如 'wow', 'totally'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'change', 'style', 'suit', 'look' 等核心词汇
